title: Renegade Leader
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Renegade Leader''' was the callsign given to the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of [[Renegade Flight]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Arhul Narra/Legends|Arhul Narra]] served as Renegade Leader until his death at the [[Battle of Derra IV]].

==Appearances==
*{{ESBRadio|Freedom's Winter}} {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]] {{1stp}} {{Flash}}
